title: Semantic Caching
text: Semantic caching improves latency and lowers cost by reusing answers for repeated or near-duplicate questions. It is one of the fastest production wins in RAG systems.

title: Hybrid Retrieval
text: Hybrid retrieval combines semantic retrieval with keyword search so the system gets both broad recall and exact lexical matching.

title: Reranking for Precision
text: Cross-encoder reranking improves precision by rescoring the broad candidate set and moving the most relevant chunks to the top.

title: Conversation Memory
text: History-aware retrieval rewrites follow-up questions into standalone questions so conversational RAG can resolve references like it and its.

title: CRAG Self-Correction
text: CRAG evaluates retrieval quality, refines ambiguous queries, and falls back when the system lacks grounded knowledge.

title: FastAPI Deployment
text: FastAPI is a strong deployment layer for RAG because it supports async endpoints, validation, streaming, and clear operational boundaries.

title: Evaluation Metrics
text: RAG evaluation should track faithfulness, relevance, citation quality, latency, and cache hit rate so improvements are measurable.

title: FAQ Precision Tip
text: Q: How do I improve RAG precision? A: Use better chunking, hybrid retrieval, and reranking before changing the model.
